touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Daniel Diallo introducing our onboarding automation platform. No response received.
LinkedIn connection request and message sent to Daniel Diallo. No response received.
Cold call attempt to Daniel Diallo. Left voicemail introducing our solution for healthcare IT onboarding challenges.
Follow-up email to Daniel Diallo highlighting specific use cases for healthcare IT onboarding. Daniel responded expressing interest in learning more about automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What kind of automation capabilities does your platform support for technical onboarding?
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation tier supports custom workflows, API integrations, and role-based provisioning sequences.

next_steps: Schedule intro call to discuss QuantumPulse's current onboarding process

touches.ai_summary: Call attempt to Daniel Diallo to schedule discovery call. No answer, left voicemail.
Second call attempt to Daniel Diallo. No answer, no voicemail left.
Follow-up email to Daniel with proposed times for discovery call. Daniel confirmed meeting for next week and mentioned he's new to the Director of Sales role.

questions_asked.question: I just stepped into this role three months ago—what's typically involved in your discovery process?
questions_asked.answer: We'll walk through your current onboarding workflow, pain points, team size, and integration requirements. Usually 30-45 minutes.

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next Tuesday

touches.ai_summary: Confirmation email sent with discovery call agenda and prep questions about QuantumPulse's onboarding challenges. Daniel replied with context about current manual processes.
Email exchange where Daniel asked about our approach compared to other solutions. Briefly discussed competitive landscape without naming specific vendors.

questions_asked.question: How does your solution differ from other platforms we might be evaluating?
questions_asked.answer: We focus on unlimited automation and deep integration capabilities, especially for complex healthcare IT environments. Happy to do a detailed comparison on our call.

next_steps: Prepare competitive positioning for discovery call

touches.ai_summary: Brief pre-discovery sync call with Daniel. Discussed his priorities for the upcoming discovery call and confirmed stakeholders. Daniel mentioned they're also looking at Fathom but haven't made any decisions yet.

questions_asked.question: Who else should we include in the discovery call from your team?
questions_asked.answer: Just me for now. I'll loop in our CRO Daniel King if we move forward, but I want to vet the solution first.

questions_asked.question: We're looking at a few options including Fathom—what's your take on that comparison?
questions_asked.answer: Both are solid platforms. We tend to excel with teams needing more complex automation workflows and deeper integrations. Let's explore your specific needs on the discovery call.

next_steps: Main discovery call scheduled for tomorrow

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Daniel Diallo. Discussed QuantumPulse's current onboarding process for 21 healthcare IT team members. Daniel outlined pain points with manual workflows and integration gaps. He's evaluating solutions to reduce onboarding time from 3 weeks to under 1 week.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current onboarding process—what does week one look like?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual provisioning across 5-6 tools, plus compliance training. IT ops handles access requests via tickets, which creates bottlenecks.

questions_asked.question: What's driving this project now? What changed?
questions_asked.answer: We're scaling the sales engineering team and our current process can't keep up. Plus I'm trying to make an impact in my first six months in this role.

questions_asked.question: What kind of ROI are your other healthcare IT customers seeing?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 60-70% reduction in onboarding time and 40% fewer support tickets in the first 30 days. I can share specific case studies.

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with case studies and demo agenda. Daniel confirmed demo timing and asked if we could include integration details for their specific tech stack.

questions_asked.question: Can you show integrations with Okta, ServiceNow, and our LMS during the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely—we have pre-built connectors for all three. I'll customize the demo to show those workflows.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming demo details and sharing integration documentation. Daniel acknowledged and mentioned he'd like to move quickly if the demo goes well.

Proposal call following successful demo. Discussed pricing for 21 seats with unlimited automation tier. Daniel expressed budget concerns and mentioned Fathom's pricing is lower. Proposed $15,500 ACV with 31.6% discount to close quickly.

questions_asked.question: What's your best pricing for 21 seats? Fathom quoted us significantly lower.
questions_asked.answer: Our list price would be $22,680 annually, but I can work with my manager on a discount given your use case and timeline. What's Fathom's quote?

questions_asked.question: What's driving the timeline pressure? When do you need this implemented?
questions_asked.answer: We're onboarding 8 new sales engineers in Q2. Ideally live by early May.

objections: Pricing is higher than Fathom's quote
next_steps: Introduce Daniel King for executive alignment

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Daniel King (CRO) and Daniel Diallo. Discussed strategic value of onboarding automation for QuantumPulse's growth plans. Daniel King asked detailed questions about ROI, security compliance, and implementation timeline. Pricing discussion resulted in verbal agreement on $15,500 ACV.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: 4-6 weeks for initial deployment, with core workflows live within 3 weeks. We'll assign a dedicated implementation engineer.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle HIPAA compliance and security audits?
questions_asked.answer: We're SOC 2 Type II certified and HIPAA compliant. All healthcare customers go through our security review process during implementation.

questions_asked.question: Beyond Daniel's team, are there other departments that could benefit from this platform?
questions_asked.answer: Potentially customer success and IT ops, but let's start with sales engineering and prove value first.

objections: Need to ensure implementation doesn't disrupt Q2 onboarding plans

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with formal proposal including discounted pricing, implementation timeline, and security documentation. Daniel Diallo acknowledged receipt and said he's reviewing with Daniel King.
Call attempt to Daniel Diallo to check in on proposal review. No answer, left voicemail.
Follow-up email checking on proposal status. Daniel responded that they're still in final review with finance and legal. Mentioned Fathom has been responsive with questions.

questions_asked.question: Can you provide more detail on the unlimited automation tier limits? Fathom's rep was very clear on their tier structure.
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited automation means no caps on workflow executions, API calls, or custom integrations. I can jump on a quick call to clarify any specific scenarios you're concerned about.

touches.ai_summary: Email exchange addressing Daniel's questions about automation tier and contract terms. Daniel confirmed they're planning to make a final decision this week and will need to negotiate payment terms.

questions_asked.question: What flexibility do you have on payment terms? Can we do quarterly instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Let me check with finance. Our standard is annual, but we've accommodated quarterly for strategic customers. I'll get back to you tomorrow.
